title: Buttery Juicy Avocado Salad
description: A light and refreshing Argentinian dish featuring a fusion of flavors including avocado, ginger cordial, and caramelized elements, perfect for a healthy yet indulgent snack.

ingredients.name: Avocado
ingredients.notes: Ripe and slightly overripe is ideal for best texture

ingredients.name: Ginger Cordial Syrup
ingredients.notes: Can be homemade or store-bought sugar-free option available

ingredients.name: Caramelize Brown Sugar
ingredients.notes: For caramelized effect, optional for added sweetness

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for maximum flavor intensity

ingredients.name: Greek Yogurt
ingredients.notes: To bind and add creaminess without dairy

ingredients.name: Dill Leaves
ingredients.notes: For a touch of freshness and herbaceous flavor

instructions: Peel, pit, and dice the avocado into small cubes.
Combine diced avocado with lemon juice in a bowl. Mix well until no lumps remain.
Stir in Greek yogurt to thicken and add creaminess.
Gently mix in ginger cordial syrup until flavors are well combined.
Add caramelize brown sugar if using, stirring until fully dissolved and evenly distributed.
Fold in dill leaves for a final touch of freshness.
Serve chilled or at room temperature as desired.
